summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All new features working: Image upload endpoints, player profile pages, academy grouping, standings with team_logo field, Match Control Center with sound effects, and standalone admin CMS layout. 24/25 backend tests passed (1 infrastructure-related failure for static file routing through external URL).

minor.issue: Static files accessible via internal port 8001 but not through external URL (Kubernetes ingress routing issue - /uploads/ not routed to backend)
minor.note: Backend correctly serves static files. Issue is infrastructure routing, not code.

issues: No team logos displayed - team_logo field exists but seeded data has no logos. Feature works, just no data.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Configure Kubernetes ingress to route /uploads/* to backend port 8001 for external static file access
OPTIONAL: Add team logos to standings seed data to demonstrate logo feature
critical_code_review_comments: sounds.js uses Web Audio API correctly with proper error handling
ImageUpload component properly handles both file upload and URL input modes
Player profile page has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Admin panel correctly excludes public navbar/footer for standalone CMS layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified: 1) POST /api/admin/players/{id}/upload-image works with auth, 2) POST /api/admin/upload-image works with auth, 3) GET /api/players/{id} returns full player detail with statistics, 4) Static files served at /uploads/players/ (internal only), 5) Player profile page at /player/:playerId shows player info, stats, bio, 6) Team page player cards are clickable links to /player/:id, 7) ImageUpload component has Upload/URL toggle with dropzone, 8) Academy page groups players by academy group, 9) Standings table has team_logo field (no logos in seed data), 10) Match Control Center works with events, stats, quick actions, 11) Admin has standalone CMS layout (no public navbar/footer), 12) sounds.js implements Web Audio API for match events.

frontend_pages: Team page - PASS (player cards link to profiles)
Player profile page - PASS (stats, bio, photo)
Academy page - PASS (grouped by academy group)
Admin Live Score tab - PASS (Match Control Center)
components_verified: Match Control Center - score inputs, events, stats, quick actions
